description: ServiceNow (Now Platform REST/UI, g_ck CSRF token, AMB channel) priors.
llmFlowNotes: ServiceNow: the CSRF token g_ck is issued server-side and sent back as the X-UserToken header (and sysparm_ck body/query field). Extract the fresh g_ck from the page/bootstrap response and substitute it into X-UserToken and sysparm_ck everywhere — replaying the recorded g_ck yields 'Invalid transaction' 401/403.
ServiceNow: /login.do establishes the session (glide_user_session/glide_session_store cookies) — protect it as a session producer.
ServiceNow: /api/now/table and /api/now/* are the business REST calls — never disable them to reach green.
expectations: g_ck / X-UserToken correlated from a server response
Now REST endpoints protected as business calls
